sentences.target: C'est la conséquence de ton retard.

translations.fr: C'est la conséquence de ton retard.
translations.en: This is the consequence of your lateness.
translations.es: Esta es la consecuencia de tu tardanza.
translations.de: Das ist die Folge deiner Verspätung.
translations.it: Questa è la conseguenza del tuo ritardo.
translations.yue: 呢個就係你遲到嘅後果。
translations.pt: Esta é a consequência do seu atraso.
translations.vi: Đây là hậu quả của việc bạn đến muộn.
translations.nl: Dit is het gevolg van je te laat komen.
translations.hi: यह तुम्हारी देरी का परिणाम है.
translations.el: Αυτό είναι το αποτέλεσμα της αργοπορίας σου.
translations.nb: Dette er konsekvensen av at du kom for sent.
translations.sv: Detta är konsekvensen av att du kom för sent.
translations.da: Det er konsekvensen af, at du kom for sent.
translations.ja: これはあなたの遅刻の結果です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic form of the demonstrative pronoun, elided before a vowel; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person singular, linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'conséquence'.
Common noun, feminine; predicate nominal of the copula 'est'.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement ('de ton retard').
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'retard'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Tu connais la conséquence de ce choix.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔnɛ la kɔ̃sekɑ̃s də sə ʃwa/

translations.fr: Tu connais la conséquence de ce choix.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔnɛ la kɔ̃sekɑ̃s də sə ʃwa/
translations.en: You know the consequence of this choice.
translations.es: Conoces la consecuencia de esta elección.
translations.de: Du kennst die Folge dieser Entscheidung.
translations.it: Conosci la conseguenza di questa scelta.
translations.ko: 너는 이 선택의 결과를 알고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你知道这个选择的后果。
translations.pt: Você conhece a consequência dessa escolha.
translations.he: אתה יודע את התוצאה של הבחירה הזו.
translations.vi: Bạn biết hậu quả của lựa chọn này.
translations.nl: Je kent het gevolg van deze keuze.
translations.hu: Ismered ennek a döntésnek a következményét.
translations.hi: तुम इस चुनाव के परिणाम को जानते हो.
translations.el: Ξέρεις τη συνέπεια αυτής της επιλογής.
translations.nb: Du kjenner konsekvensen av dette valget.
translations.id: Kamu tahu konsekuensi dari pilihan ini.
translations.sv: Du känner till konsekvensen av det här valet.
translations.da: Du kender konsekvensen af dette valg.
translations.ja: あなたはこの選択の結果を知っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present 2nd person singular; takes 'la conséquence' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'conséquence'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'connais'.
Preposition introducing the complement 'ce choix'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'choix'.
Common noun, masculine (invariable in form); object of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: La fatigue est la conséquence du manque de sommeil.
sentences.reading: /la fatiɡ ɛ la kɔ̃sekɑ̃s dy mɑ̃k də sɔmɛj/

translations.fr: La fatigue est la conséquence du manque de sommeil.
translations.ipa: /la fatiɡ ɛ la kɔ̃sekɑ̃s dy mɑ̃k də sɔmɛj/
translations.en: Fatigue is the consequence of lack of sleep.
translations.es: El cansancio es la consecuencia de la falta de sueño.
translations.de: Müdigkeit ist die Folge von Schlafmangel.
translations.it: La stanchezza è la conseguenza della mancanza di sonno.
translations.zh-Hans: 疲劳是睡眠不足的后果。
translations.pt: O cansaço é a consequência da falta de sono.
translations.he: עייפות היא התוצאה של חוסר שינה.
translations.vi: Mệt mỏi là hậu quả của việc thiếu ngủ.
translations.nl: Vermoeidheid is het gevolg van slaapgebrek.
translations.hi: थकान नींद की कमी का परिणाम है.
translations.el: Η κούραση είναι το αποτέλεσμα της έλλειψης ύπνου.
translations.nb: Tretthet er en konsekvens av søvnmangel.
translations.id: Kelelahan adalah konsekuensi dari kurang tidur.
translations.sv: Trötthet är en konsekvens av sömnbrist.
translations.ro: Oboseala este consecința lipsei de somn.
translations.da: Træthed er en konsekvens af søvnmangel.
translations.ja: 疲労は睡眠不足の結果だ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'fatigue'.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present 3rd person singular; links subject and predicate nominal.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'conséquence'.
Common noun, feminine; predicate nominal with 'est'.
Prepositional contraction of 'de' + 'le'; introduces the definite complement 'manque'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'du'.
Preposition introducing the complement 'sommeil'.
Common noun, masculine; complement of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: Ça a une conséquence sur le budget.
sentences.reading: /sa a yn kɔ̃sekɑ̃s syʁ lə bydʒɛ/

translations.fr: Ça a une conséquence sur le budget.
translations.ipa: /sa a yn kɔ̃sekɑ̃s syʁ lə bydʒɛ/
translations.en: That has a consequence on the budget.
translations.de: Das hat eine Auswirkung auf das Budget.
translations.it: Questo ha una conseguenza sul bilancio.
translations.vi: Điều đó ảnh hưởng đến ngân sách.
translations.nl: Dat heeft gevolgen voor het budget.
translations.hi: इसका बजट पर असर पड़ता है.
translations.ja: それは予算に影響する。

tokens.explanation: Colloquial demonstrative pronoun; subject of the clause.

Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'a'.
Preposition marking the domain/target affected ('sur le budget').
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces 'budget'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'sur'.
